title: Sound Event Poster AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end dark event poster for Resonance Lab, used for experimental sound art exhibition. Subject: A large abstract sound-field installation visualizes music, spatial energy, rhythm, and waveform movement. Composition: Asymmetric event poster hierarchy with deep negative space, Chinese-English typography, thin dividers, numbered micro labels, and formal event information. Signature Elements: algorithmic data rings and contour-wave vortex as the central visual structure, with spatial depth, controlled glow, and experimental art direction. Style: Premium art festival, music academy, design exhibition, or technology forum poster; cold, professional, experimental, and print-ready. Color Palette: a restrained dark base palette with controlled blue, violet, cyan, warm-gold, orange, or cool-white accent glow with dark base color and restrained accent glow; Typography: Use 声场实验室, RESONANCE LAB, 2026.08.16 19:30, West Bund Art Center, and concise information blocks. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Signature Elements: algorithmic data rings and contour-wave vortex as the central visual structure, with spatial depth, controlled glow, and experimental art direction. Style: Premium art festival, music academy, design exhibition, or technology forum poster; cold, professional, experimental, and print-ready. Color Palette: a restrained dark base palette with controlled blue, violet, cyan, warm-gold, orange, or cool-white accent glow with dark base color and restrained accent glow; Typography: Use 声场实验室, RESONANCE LAB, 2026.08.16 19:30, West Bund Art Center, and concise information blocks. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end dark event poster for Frequency Garden, used for music technology forum. Signature Elements: particle waveform mountain as the central visual structure, with spatial depth, controlled glow, and experimental art direction. Style: Premium art festival, music academy, design exhibition, or technology forum poster; cold, professional, experimental, and print-ready. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
